description: Third game in the season on a brand new account, going 12-3 in high diamond/champ lobbies. This player knew where everyone was with no intel, and his teammates were knowledgeable on our locations as well. This match, I called him out on his KD so he was giving calls to our locations to his teammates. This player was also tracing us through walls to make sure that he chose his fights correctly.

latest_comment.message: I blocked him and found his name through that? There is no way for me to record that as match replay doesn't allow you to block people in replay. I don't just call out hacks on random people for the fun of it, I call out hacks on the people who are currently cheating.
